creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
interesting compile output(s).  once (newer) one come out, same amd64 
problems will need to be addessed.

look at this altermime03.10 compile on amd64: cc -Wall -Werror -g -I. -O2 
vs compile on altermime 03.8 compile on amd64: c -Wall -O2 
-fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=nocona -I. -O2

(0.3.10 doesn't put in the -no-strict-aliasing -pipe and -march nocona.

yes, I have cputype?nocona in make.conf


===>  Building for altermime-0.3.10
cc -Wall -Werror -g -I. -O2  -c strstack.c
cc -Wall -Werror -g -I. -O2  -c mime_alter.c
cc -Wall -Werror -g -I. -O2  -c ffget.c
cc -Wall -Werror -g -I. -O2  -c pldstr.c
cc -Wall -Werror -g -I. -O2  -c filename-filters.c
cc -Wall -Werror -g -I. -O2  -c logger.c
cc -Wall -Werror -g -I. -O2  -c MIME_headers.c
cc -Wall -Werror -g -I. -O2  -c libmime-decoders.c
cc -Wall -Werror -g -I. -O2  -c boundary-stack.c
cc -Wall -Werror -g -I. -O2  -c qpe.c
qpe.c: In function `qp_encode':
qpe.c:100: warning: int format, different type arg (arg 3)
qpe.c:111: warning: int format, different type arg (arg 5)
qpe.c: In function `qp_encode_from_file':
qpe.c:152: warning: int format, different type arg (arg 3)
qpe.c:158: warning: int format, different type arg (arg 3)
qpe.c:172: warning: int format, different type arg (arg 4)




===>  Building for altermime-0.3.8
cc -Wall -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=nocona -I. -O2  -c strstack.c

mime_alter.c
cc -Wall -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=nocona -I. -O2  -c ffget.c
cc -Wall -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=nocona -I. -O2  -c pldstr.c
cc -Wall -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=nocona -I. -O2  -c 
filename-filters.c
cc -Wall -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=nocona -I. -O2  -c logger.c
cc -Wall -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=nocona -I. -O2  -c 
MIME_headers.c
cc -Wall -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=nocona -I. -O2  -c 
libmime-decoders.c

qpe.c:99: warning: int format, different type arg (arg 3)
qpe.c:110: warning: int format, different type arg (arg 5)

qpe.c:150: warning: int format, different type arg (arg 3)
qpe.c:156: warning: int format, different type arg (arg 3)
qpe.c:169: warning: int format, different type arg (arg 4)
cc -Wall -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=nocona -I. -O2  
altermime.c strstack.o mime_alter.o ffget.o pldstr.o filename-filters.o 
logger.o MIME_headers.o libmime-decoders.o boundary-stack.o qpe.o -o
